speaker: speaker1
text: Good afternoon , madam . How can I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , I am a bit out of shape . I'm thinking about getting some exercises to keep fit .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , that's good news for us .

speaker: speaker1
text: First of all , we'll design a custom-made work-out plan according to your habits .

speaker: speaker2
text: How can you get that done ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , we give each of our customers a personal trainer who is qualified . And he will give you a fitness assessment and then come up with the work-out plan for your needs .

speaker: speaker1
text: Since everyone is different , your personal trainer will find you a suitable type of exercise equipment and teach you all the techniques to help you achieve your fitness level and goal .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sounds pretty good . What about the charge ?

speaker: speaker1
text: That depends . We offer membership for one month , half a year and one year .

speaker: speaker2
text: Maybe one month . Just have a try first . Not too tough at the beginning .

speaker: speaker1
text: Wise decision . You'll find it's totally worth it .
